news-global-econ.title: Fox News Poll: Broad anxiety about AI doesn’t extend to jobs
news-global-econ.description: A new poll finds voter concern about AI has risen to 66%, while nearly two-thirds are uncomfortable with military use of autonomous weapons systems.

news-global-econ.title: Woman’s double-twin relationship sparks court’s impossible paternity ruling
news-global-econ.description: A UK Court of Appeals ruled that neither of two identical twins can be legally named the father of a child, as DNA testing cannot distinguish them.

news-global-econ.description:
American factories expanded at their fastest pace in nearly four years in March, shrugging off a war-driven surge in input costs that has dominated headlines but failed to dent the sector's momentum.

news-global-soc.title: Trump says Iran ‘no longer a threat’ after 32 days — outlines next phase of US war
news-global-soc.description: Trump declares Iran "no longer a threat" after a 32-day military campaign, claiming nuclear sites were destroyed by B-2 bombers and warning of more strikes.
